dag_update.py.description: Safely update the Hypothesis DAG with a cross-platform file lock.

--hypothesis.description: Description of the new hypothesis (Required if action=add).

--metric.description: The evaluation metric. Must align with DAG primary metric (Optional).

--node-id.description: Node ID to update (Required if action=update).

start-hypothesis.description: Design the scope and plan for a hypothesis node (Experimental Design).

progress-hypothesis.description: Activate or continue execution of a framed research item (Experimental Execution).

--wi-id.description: AAW Work Item ID e.g., WI-042

--clean-room.description: Enforce Clean Room verification against main branch to prevent worker bias.
